title: Exchange rates
summary: This Bank of Canada webpage is a navigation and information page describing available exchange rate data services, tools, and historical data downloads. It does not contain actual exchange rate values, specific market analysis, or macro catalyst information. All rates listed are described as 'indicative rates only' obtained from aggregated financial institution quotes.
key_points: Page describes types of exchange rate data available: daily (published by 16:30 ET), monthly (last business day of month), and annual (last business day of year)
Canadian Effective Exchange Rate (CEER) index is described as a weighted average of bilateral exchange rates against major trading partner currencies
The prior Canadian-Dollar Effective Exchange Rate index (CERI) was replaced by CEER as of January 2018
Foreign exchange intervention is stated to be updated 'if and when' the Bank intervenes in markets
Page provides access to Currency Converter, RSS feeds, and historical noon/closing rates data
All exchange rates are explicitly labeled as 'indicative rates only' obtained from aggregated price quotes
why_it_matters: This page has no direct market relevance as it does not provide current exchange rate data or analysis. It serves only as a directory for accessing the Bank of Canada's FX data services and tools.

issues_found: event_type is set to 'unknown' when the source is about exchange rate data services - a more specific type like 'data_release_other' or 'treasury/operations' might be more appropriate, though this page itself is a container
source_type correctly identified as 'listing_page', which triggers automatic rejection per core rules
The record's assessment is accurate: this is a navigation page with no substantive exchange rate data, analysis, or macro catalyst content
Published_at is empty, which is noted but acceptable for this page type
